hypothesis_queue.hypothesis: Cross-sectional daily top-k ranking (long top 3-4 by LGBM pred at 14:00 ET, exit next day) beats per-ticker threshold entries
SPY/QQQ regime overlay (only deploy full heat when SPY > 20d MA) improves Sharpe by cutting down-tape exposure
hypothesis_queue.test: backtest with regime filter on entry gate

hypothesis_queue.hypothesis: Earnings-calendar blackout (no entries within 2 days of earnings) removes uncompensated gap risk on 1-day holds
Removing dead ensemble weights (Transformer/TCN contribute 0.0 in every live trade) and renormalizing LGBM 60->75, sentiment 20->25 sharpens the entry signal
hypothesis_queue.test: IC comparison of reweighted ensemble on validation window
implementation_summary: Added EnsembleWeights.renormalize_dropping_dead_models(active) classmethod — drops zero-IC models and renormalizes remaining weights.
Fixed EnsembleWeights.from_staging() to check 'ensemble_weights' key first, then 'proposed_weights' as fallback — fixes key mismatch bug where profit agent proposals were silently ignored.

Fixed ProfitAgent._propose_weights() to: (1) return all 4 weight keys explicitly (was missing 'lgbm' key), (2) auto-detect dead-weight condition (transformer_ic<0.01 AND tcn_ic<0.01) and return H4 weights.
Fixed ProfitAgent.run() to write 'ensemble_weights' key in staging file so from_staging() can read it.
Added config/staging/profit_suggestions.json with H4 proposal, risk assessment, and governance metadata.
Added 18 new unit tests in tests/unit/test_ensemble_weights.py — all pass.
Fixed pre-existing test failure in test_forecast_agent.py (missing env vars for get_settings()).
63/63 unit tests green (test_signal_loop.py excluded: torch not installed in sandbox).
hypothesis_queue.index_risk_quant_verdict: APPROVED_FOR_STAGING — calibration correction only. In sizing mode, entry gates use lgbm_pred_return/lgbm_dir_prob directly; ensemble_signal is not the gate variable. No lookahead, no leakage, backed by 100% of live trade observations. Needs data run for IC delta confirmation.
hypothesis_queue.expected_impact: Ensemble signal correctly calibrated to [−1, +1] range. Strength classification more accurate. RL obs dim-0 more informative. No entry-gate behavior change in sizing mode.

completed_iterations.tests_status: 63 passed / 1 collection error (torch missing in sandbox)
